author: y4rr
content: Plan (Sprint C.9): Add 3 #[ignore]-gated integration tests in ferrotorch-llama/tests/integration_quant_loaders.rs — gptq_smoke, awq_smoke, hqq_smoke. Each test: (1) calls ferrotorch_hub::hf_download_model to fetch a small quantized HF checkpoint, (2) loads via the appropriate quant_loader (GptqQ4/AwqQ4/HqqWeights), (3) runs forward on a fixed prompt, (4) compares logits against JSON reference fixture at F32_TRANSCENDENTAL=1e-5 tolerance. Also add scripts/regenerate_quant_loader_fixtures.py — a Python reference generator that runs the same 3 model+prompt forward passes through HF transformers + auto_gptq/autoawq/hqq and saves expected logits to ferrotorch-llama/tests/fixtures/quant_loader_expected.json. Tests are #[ignore]'d so CI remains clean; run with: cargo test -p ferrotorch-llama -- --ignored quant_loader_smoke. No changes to quant_loaders.rs source — test-only work per sprint scope.
